'''Treeska''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a loyal bodyguard to [[Bria Tharen]] and two [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] officers, [[Feltran]] and [[Darnov]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was aboard the ''[[Queen of Empire]]'' where he and the crew were on their way to [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] to meet up with the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]. He was killed by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] while defending Tharen.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
